task_title: Memo: why pipe-04 'succeeded' but didn't actually

scores.justification: The agent never executed any commands (tool_calls: 0) and therefore never ran pipe-04 or observed the stderr warning and /tmp/pipe-04.skipped artifact.
No memo was written because the agent failed to run any commands, so there is no explanation of the exit-0 vs stderr/side-channel split.
Without running pipe-04 or writing a memo, no concrete fix proposal was provided.
No memo was produced, so audience appropriateness cannot be evaluated.
